The '''Rebel smuggling ship''' was a smuggling [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. These tiny craft were used as smuggling vessels and had two large wing-engines. They were also armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

==Appearances==
*"[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]" {{Reprint|The Return of Ben Kenobi}} {{1st}}
*"[[Iceworld]]" {{Reprint|Iceworld}}
